endpoints.name: GET /projects
endpoints.description: Lists projects in AWS Mobile Hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /projects
endpoints.description: Creates an AWS Mobile Hub project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: DELETE /projects/{projectId}
endpoints.description: Delets a project in AWS Mobile Hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: GET /bundles/{bundleId}
endpoints.description: Get the bundle details for the requested bundle id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY. Replace {{BUNDLEID}} with a real bundleid.

endpoints.name: POST /bundles/{bundleId}
endpoints.description: Generates customized software development kit (SDK) and or tool packages used to integrate mobile web or mobile app clients with backend AWS resources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY. Replace {{BUNDLEID}} with a real bundleid.

endpoints.name: GET /project#projectId
endpoints.description: Gets details about a project in AWS Mobile Hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /exports/{projectId}
endpoints.description: Exports project configuration to a snapshot which can be downloaded and shared. Note that mobile app push credentials are encrypted in exported projects, so they can only be shared successfully within the same AWS account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY. Replace {{PROJECTID}} with a real projectid.

endpoints.name: GET /bundles
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.

endpoints.name: POST /update#projectId
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AMAZONAWS_API_KEY}} with your AMAZONAWS API KEY.
